creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 253844
BETA: support RISC-V 32 ESP and minor changes to original port

I don't think I have the appetite to support a riscv32-esp-elf port. I don't have or use this hardware.

Meanwhile, someone answered my espressif github question about esp32 vs esp for the most recent tool chains; it turns out there is a wrapper that sets an environment variable that tells the cross compiler what the target hardware is. I've been slogging through getting that to build (it's ~300 lines of rust, instead of /bin/sh for some reason). I should have this working soon.
